---
title: Week notes (2026-W22)
date: 2026-05-29
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Further work on refactoring the code system
- Completed another draft of the topic modelling paper
- Some work on my INKE presentation
- First BibVik meeting in a while
- Submitted a grant application to the Gerda Henkel Foundation
- Meeting regarding another MSCA bid
- Met with Shirin regarding the positive mentorship paper
